findings.location: 構成 > クラス図 section (source)
findings.description: The class diagram image (`UserAgent_ClassDiagram.png`) is not included in the knowledge file. The source has a dedicated `クラス図` h2 section containing this image, and the sequence diagram is symmetrically included as section s5. The class diagram depicts class relationships and structure (e.g., inheritance, dependencies) that are not fully captured by the text descriptions in s1.
